commit.message:
feat(i18n): full bilingual overhaul — zh-TW/en across all pages + 21 English blog posts

Complete i18n system: React Context provider, lazy-loaded JSON dictionaries,
URL-based locale detection (/en/ prefix), language switcher in Navbar.
Covers Landing, Probe, Agent, Card, Developers, Admin pages (~790 keys).
Blog build script rewritten for dual-locale output with hreflang + dual RSS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add local64 runtime pool and smoke harness (#586)

* Add local64 runtime pool and smoke harness

* Respect existing MASC_HTTP_BASE_URL override

* Add local64 model matrix harness

* Add local64 soak and chaos harnesses

* Mark local64 harness scripts executable

* Scale local64 harness timeouts by worker count

* feat(local64): add context chaos harness

* tune(local64): bound worker max tokens

* tune(local64): tighten context chaos defaults

* test: adapt swarm status tests to timeline override

* refactor(local64): make runtime pool immutable with atomic ref swap

Remove all 9 mutable keywords from runtime record type. State mutations
now create new records via { r with field = new_value } and swap a
single module-level pool_state ref. This eliminates the race condition
risk under Eio cooperative scheduling by keeping the read-modify-write
cycle yield-free (no Eio scheduling points between !pool and pool :=).

Key changes:
- Bundle 4 separate refs into single pool_state type
- Add reset() for test isolation
- Split pure select_runtime_from from IO-performing select_runtime
- Place debug_log (which calls Eio.traceln) AFTER ref swap in acquire/release

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(local64): inject full_context from prompt and rename step to turn

Add extract_prompt_block helper to parse [FULL_CONTEXT_BEGIN]...[END]
from worker prompts and auto-inject into masc_memento_mori args.
Rename team_session_step to team_session_turn across worker system
prompt, spawn tool list, and test expectations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* tune(local64): clarify pressure prompt and reduce context lines

Reword pressure worker prompt to explicitly reference FULL_CONTEXT
markers and forbid target_agent parameter. Reduce default pressure
context lines from 16 to 4 for faster iteration.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Refactor Brain Sphere: knowledge graph architecture, dimming, electric buzz

- Add nodeTypes: project, capability, tool with progressive disclosure
- 5 capability nodes (Computer Vision, Symbolic AI, AI Interfaces, Real-Time
  Systems, AI Productivity) at ORBIT_R on same shell as orbit nodes
- 7 tool nodes as constellation children of capabilities
- Overview mode: clicking center node spreads all projects at hand-placed
  overviewPositions across sphere shell, all caps revealed, nothing dims
- Projects orbit node click expands constellation without opening inspector;
  camera pulls back to give breathing room; other orbit nodes dim
- Project child click opens inspector and dims all unrelated nodes;
  bidirectional relatedIds check keeps capability nodes bright
- Electric buzz: faint sparks travel along icosahedron wireframe edges
  every 2-5s using a pooled imperative approach (no re-renders)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace all := with = to fix Godot 4.6.1 type inference cascade

Godot 4.6.1 strictly enforces type inference with :=, treating
"inferred from Variant" warnings as errors. When one variable becomes
Variant (from Node method calls or dict access), every downstream
variable using it also fails to infer. Replaced all 386 := with = to
eliminate the entire class of parse errors. Runtime behavior is
identical.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Lower cx interactive reasoning effort from xhigh to high

commit.message:
Fix admin login on mobile — prevent auto-capitalize breaking credentials

- Add autocapitalize=off, autocorrect=off, spellcheck=false on username input
  (mobile keyboards auto-capitalize first letter, turning 'admin' into 'Admin')
- Add autocomplete=username/current-password for proper password manager support
- Make server-side username lookup case-insensitive (LOWER) as safety net

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(harness): Improve orchestrator-complex delegation criteria (#605)

Add explicit criteria for when to delegate to -simple vs -complex:
- Simple: file reads, git status, simple corrections, tests
- Complex: features (3+ files), refactoring, architecture, API changes
- Default to simple, escalate on failure, but start complex when
  the task clearly involves design decisions

This prevents the delegation cascade where strategic tasks
(architecture, features) were delegated to code-simple.

commit.message:
Fix SSH agent forwarding on remote hosts by preserving forwarded socket

gpg-agent's SSH_AUTH_SOCK override in fish was unconditionally replacing
the forwarded agent socket set by sshd, causing ssh-add -l to show no
identities on remote hosts despite -A forwarding being active.

  signal-based thread bridging (market review dialog, deauth handler)
  and QTimer.singleShot (crash handler)
- Send OCR confidence instead of template match confidence to server
- Reject submissions with confidence < 60% on both client and server
  (manually reviewed submissions bypass the minimum)

- Fallback to admin privileges if /Applications/ is not writable

commit.message:
Auto-crop transparent padding from bottle images at load time

Replaces the scale-based approach with canvas pixel analysis that
trims transparent padding and creates a cropped blob URL. All
bottles now render at the same visual size regardless of how much
empty space the original image contains. Falls back gracefully
to the original URL if CORS or canvas fails.

commit.message:
Optimize SPI display: writebytes2 + tobytes (eliminate tolist bottleneck)

- Use writebytes2() which accepts bytes directly instead of Python lists
- Use numpy .tobytes() instead of .tolist() (avoids creating 115K Python objects)
- Simplify RGB565 conversion to single uint16 operation
- Pre-allocate clear buffer (reuse across calls)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(onnx): switch ort to load-dynamic, fix RustEmbedder on Windows MSVC

- Change ort feature from copy-dylibs to load-dynamic to avoid LNK1120
  static linking errors (39 unresolved externals from libort_sys)
- Add token_type_ids as 3rd input tensor (required by BERT models with ORT 1.24+)
- Add Python _ensure_ort_dylib_path() to auto-discover DLL from pip onnxruntime
- Add Rust ensure_ort_initialized() with ORT_DYLIB_PATH/VIRTUAL_ENV discovery
  (no subprocess calls — would deadlock on GIL from PyO3 context)
- Update test_boot_warnings to handle both real and mock sage_core

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

交互设计优化：解决图案重叠问题，提升可数性

- 增大图案间距：grid从100px到140px，simple从120px到160px
- 智能布局选择：根据图案数量自动选择最佳布局（≤5用simple，6-12用grid，≥13用cluster）
- 添加网格背景：淡化的网格线帮助对齐和计数
- 增强选中状态：更明显的视觉效果和脉冲动画
- 减小动画幅度：防止动画导致视觉重叠
- 增大触摸目标：优化响应式设计中的图案尺寸
- 调整容器高度：适应更大的间距

line-dasharray does not support data-driven expressions in MapLibre.

with clarity-clean / clarity-turbid / clarity-bloom filter layers,
matching the same pattern used for bathymetry depth layers.

- Directories still visible but collapsed, no recursive traversal
